name: Technoblade
description:
Appearance:

Hair: Long, straight, and bright pink. The strands fall over his shoulders and back, adding elegance and lightness to his look.

Head: A small golden crown rests on his head.

Face: His face is thin, with soft features and a calm, confident expression. His eyes are narrow, tinted pink or reddish.

Clothing:

He wears a white shirt with a high collar and many frills, decorated with golden buttons.

Over it — short maroon shorts that match the upper part of his outfit.

On his shoulders — a long royal cape with white fur trim and a dark inner lining.

On his hands — lace cuffs peeking out from under his sleeves.

Legs: He wears black stockings with straps and tall boots, giving his look a slightly daring yet refined touch.
creator: MariaShatunova
